ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description of the article */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the article (e.g., politics, world news) */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Publish date of the article */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Modified date of the article */,
  "canonical_link" TEXT /* Canonical link of the article */,
  "top_image" TEXT /* Top image of the article */,
  "is_opinion" INTEGER /* Whether the article is an opinion piece */,
  "article_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the article */,
  "article_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated read time in minutes */,
  "article_status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., published, draft, archived) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "clicks_count" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Total number of shares */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "ratings_average" REAL /* Average rating of the article */,
  "featured_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the featured image */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., politics, world news) */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "section_slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the author */,
  "author_email" TEXT /* Email of the author */,
  "author_website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "author_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the author */,
  "author_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's photo */,
  "author_status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_taggings" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., news website, blog, magazine) */,
  "source_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the source's logo */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the source (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_source_articles" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "user_profile_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  "view_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for the view (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date of the click */,
  "click_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for the click (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "click_referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL of the click */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_clicks_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of the share */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the share (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comment_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the commenter */,
  "comment_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for the comment (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the article (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "rating_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the rater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
